zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Maurer Mason於1765年出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普時，她的父親John Phillip Mason35歲，母親Abigail Baker26歲。她於1786年4月與Henry Franks在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1842年8月16日在美國俄亥俄州韋恩多勒斯托享年77歲，埋葬在美國俄亥俄州韋恩多勒斯托斯特努特 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Maurer Mason于1765年出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普时，她的父亲John Phillip Mason35岁，母亲Abigail Baker26岁。她于1786年4月与Henry Franks在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1842年8月16日在美国俄亥俄州韋恩多勒斯托享年77岁，埋葬在美国俄亥俄州韋恩多勒斯托斯特努特 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.
Italian (Veneto): variant of   Masone  .
Altered form of French   Masson  .

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.
Scottish: variant of   Mason   ‘mason’.
Scottish: variant of   Meston  .

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

variants.name: Meason
meanings: English: variant of   Mason  .

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

nameMeanings.name: Maurer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a mason, especially a builder of walls of stone or brick, from an agent derivative of Middle High German mūre, German Mauer ‘wall’ (from Latin murus ‘wall’, especially a city wall). In the Middle Ages the majority of dwellings were built of wood (or lath and plaster), and this term would have specifically denoted someone employed in building defensive walls, castles, churches, and other public buildings. This form of the surname is also found in some other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia (see also 2 below). Compare Mourer and Mowrer .

In some cases also an Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Mavrer or Mavrar: occupational name of German origin (see 1 above), at least in some cases applied as a translation into German of the Slovenian surname Zidar .

variants.name: Mowrer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Maurer  .

variants.name: Mourer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Maurer  .
French (Lorraine): probably of German origin, an altered form   Maurer   or   Murer  .

variants.name: Mauer
meanings: German: variant of   Maurer  . This surname is also found in some other European countries, e.g. in France (Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia (see also 3 below).
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived by a wall, Middle High German mūre, German Mauer. As a Jewish name it can be artificial. Compare Mower .
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian   Maver  . See also 1 above.

variants.name: Meurer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Maurer  .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Historical Boundaries 1783: Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Second State to Ratify U.S. Constitution
historicEvents.description: On December 12, 1787, Pennsylvania ratified the U.S. Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Maurer Mason was born in 1765, in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, her father, John Phillip Mason, was 35 and her mother, Abigail Baker, was 26. She married Henry Franks in April 1786, in Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 16 August 1842, in Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, United States, at the age of 77, and was buried in Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Maurer Mason est née en 1765, à German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, John Phillip Mason, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Abigail Baker, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Franks en avril 1786, à Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 août 1842, à Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Maurer Mason 1765 in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Phillip Mason 35 und ihre Mutter Abigail Baker 26. Sie hat im April 1786 in Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Henry Franks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. August 1842 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Maurer Mason è nata il nel 1765 nel German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Phillip Mason, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Abigail Baker, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Henry Franks nel aprile 1786, nel Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 16 agosto 1842, nel Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Maurer Masonが1765年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップで生まれた時，父John Phillip Masonは35歳，母Abigail Bakerは26歳であった。1786年4月にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットでHenry Franksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1842年8月16日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインドイレストウンで77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインドイレストウンチェストヌト ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Maurer Mason(이)가 1765년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Phillip Mason(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Baker(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1786년 4월 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트에서 Henry Franks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1842년 8월 16일 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인 도일레스타운에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인 도일레스타운 체스트누트 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Maurer Mason nasceu em 1765, em German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Phillip Mason, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Baker, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Franks em abril de 1786, em Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1842, em Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Maurer Mason родилась в 1765 г. в местности джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Phillip Mason было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Baker, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Franks апрель 1786 г. в местности феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 16 августа 1842 г. в местности доилестоун, веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности честнут хилл кеметири, доилестоун, веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina Maurer Mason nació en 1765, en German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Phillip Mason, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Abigail Baker, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Henry Franks en abril de 1786, en Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1842, en Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Chestnut Hill Cemetery, Doylestown, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos.
